title: SciRAG: Adaptive, Citation-Aware, and Outline-Guided Retrieval and Synthesis for Scientific Literature
research_areas: T10 Question Answering, Open-domain question answering, closed-domain question answering, extractive and abstractive QA, multi-hop question answering

T08 Evaluation, Validation, Quality Assurance and Benchmarking Methodologies
